message:
✨ Add token usage tracking to agent server

- Add session and daily token tracking fields to Server struct
- Track tokens after each chat request via addTokenUsage()
- Return accumulated tokens in /health endpoint via getClaudeInfo()
- Bump version to 0.3.4

The frontend can now display accurate token usage from the agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
